summary: CPC Delete Production Schedule feature testing completed. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 skipped due to capacity constraints). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working correctly. Fixed a bug where DELETED schedules were appearing in the branch-schedules endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: All backend API tests passed - Delete Schedule feature fully functional
GET /api/production-schedules/preview-delete - Returns schedules for given month and branch with summary stats
POST /api/production-schedules/bulk-soft-delete - Marks schedules as DELETED without hard deleting
GET /api/production-schedules/deleted-completions - Returns completed quantities from deleted schedules for auto-population
GET /api/cpc/branch-schedules - Fixed to exclude DELETED schedules (was missing this filter)
Frontend Delete Schedule tab renders correctly with month picker and branch dropdown
Summary cards show correct counts (total schedules, schedules with completed qty, total target qty, total completed qty)
Preview table shows schedule details with correct status badges
Confirmation dialog shows warning about soft-delete and requires explicit confirmation
Success toast message appears after deletion
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created during testing with SKU FC_KS_BE_115 and branch Unit 1 Vedica
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC Delete Production Schedule feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/production-schedules/preview-delete?month=YYYY-MM&branch=Name returns schedules for preview with summary stats. 2) POST /api/production-schedules/bulk-soft-delete sets status to 'DELETED' and records deletion metadata. 3) GET /api/production-schedules/deleted-completions returns completed quantities from deleted schedules. 4) Deleted schedules are excluded from /api/production-schedules and /api/cpc/branch-schedules. 5) Frontend has Delete Schedule tab with month picker, branch dropdown, summary cards, preview table, and confirmation dialog. 6) Test month: 2026-04, Test branch: Unit 1 Vedica.

backend_api.GET /api/production-schedules/preview-de: PASS - Returns schedules for given month and branch
backend_api.GET /api/production-schedules (excludes: PASS - No DELETED schedules in response
backend_api.GET /api/cpc/branch-schedules (excludes: PASS - Fixed to exclude DELETED schedules

bug_fixed.description: DELETED schedules were appearing in /api/cpc/branch-schedules endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: Query filter only excluded CANCELLED status, not DELETED
